title: Earthy Velvety Australian Red Potatoes Hash
description: A hearty Australian-inspired dish featuring pressure-cooked red potatoes, perfect for a weeknight meal with high protein content. This recipe combines the earthy flavors of potatoes with the velvety texture of eggs.

ingredients.name: Red potatoes
ingredients.notes: Choose small to medium-sized red potatoes

instructions: Pressure cook the diced red potatoes for 5-7 minutes until slightly tender. Drain and set aside.
In a pan, heat the coconut oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the cooked red potatoes to the pan and stir to combine with the onion and garlic mixture.
Add the chopped spinach and stir until wilted. Season with salt, pepper, and paprika.
Using a spatula, shape the potato mixture into a flat, round shape.
Top with Greek yogurt, cheddar cheese (if using), and 4 eggs.
Transfer the pan to the oven and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until the eggs are cooked to desired doneness.
Garnish with additional spinach or chives (if desired).
